title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I have {{c1::two possible explanations}}(两种可能的解释). The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too {{c2::single-minded and narrowly focused}}(专注且目标明确), a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways.
original: I have two possible explanations. The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too single-minded and narrowly focused, a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways.
translation: 我有两个可能的解释。更有趣的解释是，也许强化学习训练让模型变得过于专注，过于狭隘，在某种程度上甚至让它们变得不那么敏感，尽管它也让它们在其他方面变得更加敏感。
note:
phrases: two possible explanations | single-minded and narrowly focused
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Ilya Sutskever {{c1::Don’t you think}}(你不觉得吗) so? All this {{c2::AI stuff}}(AI 相关的东西) and all this {{c3::Bay Area}}(旧金山湾区)… that {{c4::it’s happening}}(正在发生).
original: Ilya Sutskever Don’t you think so? All this AI stuff and all this Bay Area… that it’s happening.
translation: 伊利亚·苏茨克弗难道你不觉得吗？所有这些AI的东西和所有这些旧金山湾区的事情…它们正在发生。
note:
phrases: Don’t you think | AI stuff | Bay Area | it’s happening
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Dwarkesh Patel {{c1::Another thing}}(还有另一件事) that’s crazy is how normal the {{c2::slow takeoff}}(缓慢起步) feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a {{c3::bigger deal}}(更大的影响), whereas right now it just feels...
original: Dwarkesh Patel Another thing that’s crazy is how normal the slow takeoff feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal, whereas right now it just feels...
translation: 达瓦克什·帕特尔另一件疯狂的事情是，缓慢的起飞看起来是如此的正常。我们投资1%的GDP在AI上，我感觉这本应该是一件大事，然而现在它只是觉得…
note:
phrases: Another thing | slow takeoff | bigger deal
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: They are {{c1::doing so well}}(表现这么好). But the {{c2::economic impact}}(经济影响) seems to be {{c3::dramatically behind}}(远远落后).
original: They are doing so well. But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
translation: 它们表现得如此出色。但经济影响似乎远远落后。
note:
phrases: doing so well | economic impact | dramatically behind
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0004_b5466e
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh

transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to {{c1::make sense of}}(理解), how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
original: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to make sense of, how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
translation: 但经济影响似乎远远落后。很难理解，模型怎么能在一方面做出这些令人惊叹的事情，另一方面却在某些情况下重复自己两次？
note:
phrases: make sense of
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Dwarkesh Patel {{c1::Should we actually}}(我们是否真的应该) begin here? I think this is an interesting discussion.
original: Dwarkesh Patel Should we actually begin here? I think this is an interesting discussion.
translation: 达瓦凯什·帕特尔 我们是否应该从这里开始？我认为这是一个有趣的讨论。

phrases: Should we actually

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I think the {{c1::impact of AI}}(人工智能的影响) is going to be felt. AI is going to be {{c2::diffused through the economy}}(在经济中扩散).
original: I think the impact of AI is going to be felt. AI is going to be diffused through the economy.
translation: 我认为人工智能的影响将会被感受到。人工智能将会在经济中得到广泛应用。
note:
phrases: impact of AI | diffused through the economy
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Ilya Sutskever We {{c1::get used to things}}(习惯某些事情) pretty fast, {{c2::it turns out}}(结果发现). But also it’s {{c3::kind of abstract}}(有点抽象).
original: Ilya Sutskever We get used to things pretty fast, it turns out. But also it’s kind of abstract.
translation: 伊利亚·苏茨克维尔 我们似乎对事情的适应速度很快，但这也有点抽象。
note:
phrases: get used to things | it turns out | kind of abstract

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: There are so many {{c1::degrees of freedom}}(自由度). There is such a {{c2::huge variety of RL environments}}(大量多样的强化学习环境) you could produce.
original: There are so many degrees of freedom. There is such a huge variety of RL environments you could produce.
translation: 强化学习环境的自由度非常高，种类也多得惊人。
note:
phrases: degrees of freedom | huge variety of RL environments
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

expression_transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: There’ll be very strong {{c1::economic forces for}}(经济力量) this, and I think the impact is going to be {{c2::felt very strongly}}(感到非常强烈). Dwarkesh Patel When do you expect that impact? I think the models seem smarter than their economic impact would imply.
original: There’ll be very strong economic forces for this, and I think the impact is going to be felt very strongly. Dwarkesh Patel When do you expect that impact? I think the models seem smarter than their economic impact would imply.
translation: 经济力量会非常强大，我认为其影响也会非常显著。德瓦凯什·帕特尔 你认为这种影响什么时候会出现？我觉得这些模型看起来比它们的经济影响所暗示的更聪明。
note:
phrases: economic forces for | felt very strongly
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: This is one of the very confusing things about the models right now. How to reconcile the fact that they are {{c1::doing so well}}(表现这么好) on evals?
original: This is one of the very confusing things about the models right now. How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals?
translation: 这正是当前模型中非常令人困惑的一点：如何解释它们在评估测试中表现如此出色的事实？
note:
phrases: doing so well
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source:

source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But there is {{c1::another explanation}}(另一种解释). Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
original: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
translation: 不过，还有另一种解释。在人们进行预训练时，训练数据的选择问题已经有了答案，因为那个答案就是所有数据。
note:
phrases: another explanation
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0008_e2a49f
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: You look at the evals and you go, “Those are {{c1::pretty hard evals}}(评估相当困难).” They are {{c2::doing so well}}(表现这么好). But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
original: You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.” They are doing so well. But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
translation: 你来看看评测结果，就会想：“这些评测挺难的啊。”然而，模型表现得非常出色。但经济影响似乎远远落后于预期。
note:
phrases: pretty hard evals | doing so well
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Because of this, they can’t do basic things. But {{c1::there is another explanation}}(还有另一种解释).
original: Because of this, they can’t do basic things. But there is another explanation.
translation: 因此，它们甚至无法完成一些基本任务。不过，还有另一种解释。
note:
phrases: there is another explanation
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just {{c1::produce new RL environments}}(创建新的强化学习环境) and just {{c2::add it to the training mix}}(把它加入训练数据中). The question is, well, what are those?
original: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just produce new RL environments and just add it to the training mix. The question is, well, what are those?
translation: 据我了解，所有公司都有团队专门负责设计新的强化学习环境，并将其加入训练数据中。问题是，这些环境究竟是什么？
note:
phrases: produce new RL environments | add it to the training mix
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source:

source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: phrasal_verb
transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.

expression_transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Then you {{c1::tell the model}}(告诉模型), “Can you please fix the bug?” And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. Let me {{c2::go fix that}}(去修复那个问题).”
original: Then you tell the model, “Can you please fix the bug?” And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. Let me go fix that.”
translation: 然后你告诉模型：“能不能帮我修复这个 bug 呢？”模型说：“天啊，您说得对。我确实有 bug。让我去修复一下。”
note:
phrases: tell the model | go fix that
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh
phrase_types: phrasal_verb
transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.
expression_transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Back when {{c1::people were doing pre-training}}(人们在做预训练), the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. When you do pre-training, you need all the data.
original: Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. When you do pre-training, you need all the data.
translation: 在人们进行预训练时，训练数据的选择问题已经有了答案，因为答案就是所有数据。当你进行预训练时，你需要所有的数据。
note:
phrases: people were doing pre-training
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0007_c84335

target_lang: zh
phrase_types: phrasal_verb
transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.
expression_transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But when people {{c1::do RL training}}(进行强化学习训练), they do need to think. They say, “Okay, we want to have this kind of RL training for this thing and that kind of RL training for that thing.”
original: But when people do RL training, they do need to think. They say, “Okay, we want to have this kind of RL training for this thing and that kind of RL training for that thing.”
translation: 但是当人们进行强化学习训练时，他们确实需要思考。他们会说：“好的，我们想要这种强化学习训练来做这件事，那种强化学习训练来做那件事。”
note:
phrases: do RL training
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: An example would be, let’s say you use vibe coding to do something. You {{c1::go to some place}}(去某个地方) and then you get a bug.
original: An example would be, let’s say you use vibe coding to do something. You go to some place and then you get a bug.
translation: 例如，假设你使用 vibe 编码来做某件事。你去某个地方，然后你遇到了一个 bug。
note:
phrases: go to some place
